scripts.uploads:dev: supabase db query --linked "SELECT id, filename, status, uploaded_at, NOW() - uploaded_at AS elapsed FROM dev_uploads ORDER BY uploaded_at DESC LIMIT 10;"
scripts.uploads:stuck: supabase db query --linked "SELECT id, filename, status, uploaded_at FROM dev_uploads WHERE status = 'processing' ORDER BY uploaded_at DESC;"
scripts.uploads:fix: supabase db query --linked "UPDATE dev_uploads SET status = 'error', error_msg = 'Marcado manualmente' WHERE status = 'processing';"
